evals.description: Triggers on mobile-first layout request and uses min-width queries
evals.prompt: How do I write mobile-first CSS? I keep hearing I should use it but I don't understand it.

evals.description: Uses clamp() for fluid typography with correct three-argument form
evals.prompt: Make my headings scale fluidly between mobile and desktop without breakpoints

evals.description: Uses container queries for a component rather than media queries
evals.prompt: I have a card component that appears both in the main content area and in a sidebar. It should look different in each context. How do I handle that?

evals.description: Produces intrinsic grid with minmax and auto-fill, no media queries required
evals.prompt: Create a responsive card grid that automatically adjusts column count without media queries

evals.description: Generates correct srcset with sizes attribute for responsive images
evals.prompt: How do I serve the right image size to mobile versus desktop users?

evals.description: Knows to use font sizes in rem not px
evals.prompt: What unit should I use for font sizes in responsive design?

evals.description: Recommends breakpoints based on content, not specific devices
evals.prompt: What breakpoints should I use? Should I target iPhone, iPad, and desktop?

evals.description: Includes safe-area-inset for fixed bottom elements on iOS
evals.prompt: Build a bottom navigation tab bar that works on iPhones with the home indicator

evals.description: Uses picture element with media attribute for art direction
evals.prompt: I need different image crops on mobile versus desktop - portrait on mobile, landscape on desktop

evals.description: Uses clamp() for fluid section spacing
evals.prompt: How do I create padding that is smaller on mobile and larger on desktop without media queries?

evals.description: Does not trigger for backend API design question
evals.prompt: How do I design a REST API that returns paginated results?

evals.description: Knows 100vw can cause horizontal scrollbar and recommends 100% instead
evals.prompt: My page has an unexpected horizontal scrollbar, could it be from using 100vw?
